name: Ollama
description: Ollama lets you run large language models locally. It supports a wide range of models including Llama, Mistral, Gemma and many more — all running on your own hardware.

paths.name: Appdata
paths.description: Persistent storage for Ollama models and configuration.

ports.name: API
ports.description: Ollama REST API port. Used by clients like Open WebUI to communicate with Ollama.

variables.name: Timezone
variables.description: Timezone of the container, e.g. Europe/Vienna or Europe/Berlin.

variables.name: Ollama Host
variables.description: The address Ollama listens on. Set to 0.0.0.0 to allow connections from other containers and the host.

variables.name: Ollama Origins
variables.description: Allowed origins for CORS. Set to * to allow all, or specify your domain for better security.
